statusLine.command: input=$(cat); dir=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); short_dir=$(echo "$dir" | awk -F/ '{ if (NF>3) print $(NF-2)"/"$(NF-1)"/"$NF; else print $0 }'); cd "$dir" 2>/dev/null; branch=$(git --no-optional-locks branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); dirty=''; if [ -n "$branch" ] && [ -n "$(git --no-optional-locks status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ]; then dirty=1; fi; out=$(printf '\033[1;36m%s\033[0m' "$short_dir"); if [ -n "$branch" ]; then out="$out "$(printf '\033[1;38;2;203;166;247m %s\033[0m' "$branch"); fi; if [ -n "$dirty" ]; then out="$out "$(printf '\033[1;38;2;249;226;175m*\033[0m'); fi; out="$out "$(printf '\033[38;2;137;180;250m%s\033[0m' "$model"); printf '%s' "$out"
